scripts.electron:build: bun run build && bunx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json
scripts.electron:dev: bunx tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 bunx electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.electron:pack: bun run electron:build && bunx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:pack:win: bun run electron:build && bunx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.electron:pack:mac: bun run electron:build && bunx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.electron:pack:linux: bun run electron:build && bunx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux
scripts.server:compile: bun run server:bundle-dist && bun build server/main.ts --compile --outfile release/crossdraw-server
scripts.server:compile:linux-x64: bun run server:bundle-dist && bun build server/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile release/crossdraw-server-linux-x64
scripts.server:compile:linux-arm64: bun run server:bundle-dist && bun build server/main.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile release/crossdraw-server-linux-arm64
scripts.server:compile:darwin-x64: bun run server:bundle-dist && bun build server/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile release/crossdraw-server-darwin-x64
scripts.server:compile:darwin-arm64: bun run server:bundle-dist && bun build server/main.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile release/crossdraw-server-darwin-arm64
scripts.server:compile:windows-x64: bun run server:bundle-dist && bun build server/main.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile release/crossdraw-server-windows-x64.exe
scripts.mobile:init: bunx cap init Crossdraw com.crossdraw.app --web-dir dist
scripts.mobile:sync: bun run build && bunx cap sync
scripts.mobile:android:build: bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.mobile:ios:build: bun run build && bunx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath build/Crossdraw.xcarchive archive
